text.title: Growth Copywriting Fundamentals Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Growth Copywriting Fundamentals.

example.scenario: Founder rewrites pricing page: 12 headline variants per tier, 8 VoC excerpts, 6 features translated to benefits, one CTA per tier; conversion +18%.
example.trace: preconditions=true → procedure applied → artefact emitted → validate-script passes
